title: Only A True Potterhead Can Nail All 10 Of These Emoji Clues
dek: Three emoji, one shot — can you name every Hogwarts (and Wizarding World) movie before the reveal?

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone (2001)
Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (2002)
items.reveal_text: "It is our choices, Harry, that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities."

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (2004)
items.reveal_text: "I solemnly swear that I am up to no good."

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2005)
Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix (2007)
items.reveal_text: "I'm sorry, Professor. But I must not tell lies."

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince (2009)
items.reveal_text: "You dare use my own spells against me, Potter? Yes. I'm the Half-Blood Prince."

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows – Part 1 (2010)
items.reveal_text: "Such a beautiful place, to be with friends. Dobby is happy to be with his friend."

items.reveal_title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows – Part 2 (2011)
Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them (2016)
items.reveal_text: "My philosophy is that worrying means you suffer twice."

items.reveal_title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald (2018)
items.reveal_text: "There are no strange creatures, only blinkered people."
